title: Keto Chocolate Mousse
description: A low-carb, rich dessert made with cacao and cream, perfect for keto dieters. The herbal notes enhance the chocolate flavor.
instructions: 1. Chill a mixing bowl in the freezer for 5 minutes.
2. In the chilled bowl, whip the heavy cream until stiff peaks form.
3. In a separate bowl, melt the cacao in the microwave in 10-second increments, stirring between each interval, until smooth.
4. Fold the melted cacao into the whipped cream until well combined.
5. Add the vanilla extract and granulated sweetener, folding until smooth.
6. Spoon the mousse into individual serving cups or a large serving dish.
7. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours before serving.
8. Garnish with additional cacao powder or whipped cream, if desired.
